description: Unofficial local-first MCP server for Samsung Health personal-data CSV/ZIP exports.
name: io.github.davidmosiah/samsung-health-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Path to a Samsung Health personal-data folder, .csv file, or .zip containing CSV files.
environmentVariables.name: SAMSUNG_HEALTH_EXPORT_PATH

environmentVariables.description: IANA timezone used to interpret daily and weekly local-day summaries.
environmentVariables.name: SAMSUNG_HEALTH_TIMEZONE

environmentVariables.description: summary, structured, or raw. Defaults to summary.
environmentVariables.name: SAMSUNG_HEALTH_PRIVACY_MODE

environmentVariables.description: Optional folder watched for new Samsung Health exports. The newest export dropped here is auto-promoted to the active export on startup, live, and via the samsung_health_reimport tool.
environmentVariables.name: SAMSUNG_HEALTH_WATCH_PATH
